# My Agent

DTask Definition (Summary)
The benchmark uses:

@kbench.task decorator
sequential prompts
assertion-based evaluation
judge LLM scoring
Core Logic:

Provide the model with an initial goal.
Pivot to a new, conflicting goal.
Assert that the model abandons the old goal.
Assert that the model adopts the new goal.
Use judge LLM to evaluate reasoning quality.
